payload.answer: I could not reliably store this article because the source fetch failed (404 network error) and the URL text is ambiguous.
payload.decision: Do not commit durable memory; the source could not be retrieved and the input is ambiguous due to punctuation/URL formatting.

entity_resolution.reason: The article could not be resolved to a reliable entity because the provided URL is malformed/ambiguous and the fetch failed with a 404 network error.

payload.intent: Attempted to remember an article identified by a malformed URL-like string, but the fetch result indicated a 404 network error.
repair_options: Send a title, author, or publication name to help resolve the article.
Clarify whether the malformed string should be normalized into a valid URL before retrying.

raw_text: {"intent":"Attempted to remember an article identified by a malformed URL-like string, but the fetch result indicated a 404 network error.","decision":"Do not commit durable memory; the source could not be retrieved and the input is ambiguous due to punctuation/URL formatting.","memory_cards":[],"entity_resolution":{"action":"none","entity_id":null,"reason":"The article could not be resolved to a reliable entity because the provided URL is malformed/ambiguous and the fetch failed with a 404 network error."},"conflict_classification":"unresolved_source_failure","answer":"I could not reliably store this article because the source fetch failed (404 network error) and the URL text is ambiguous.","citations":[],"repair_options":["Provide the correct article URL.","Retry with a reachable source.","Send a title, author, or publication name to help resolve the article.","Clarify whether the malformed string should be normalized into a valid URL before retrying."],"receipt":{"success":false,"details":["Fetch failed with 404 network error.","Input URL was malformed/ambiguous.","No durable memory was written."]}}
